title: Tokenized Real Estate Market Update — May 15, 2026
summary:
The tokenized real estate market continues to offer accessible entry points for retail investors seeking passive income. Across 465 active listings on Lofty and RealT, the average net yield currently sits at 10.2%, reflecting a diverse range of residential properties primarily concentrated in US markets.

Top performers this period include 1317 South Solano Dr in Las Cruces, delivering 34.61% net yield. Detroit leads in listing volume with 169 available properties, offering investors meaningful diversification within a single metro area.

Investors should review occupancy rates, fee structures, and platform-specific terms before committing capital. Brickwise scores each property on yield, risk, neighborhood quality, and token fair value to help surface the most compelling opportunities at any given time.
highlights: 465 tokenized properties tracked across Lofty and RealT
Average net yield: 10.2% across all active listings
Top yield: 34.61% — 1317 South Solano Dr, Las Cruces
